name: @my-project/plugin-office-oxide
description: Convert Office documents (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX) to Markdown or HTML using the office-oxide Rust native library, with merged-cell copy strategy for XLSX tables
description.zh-CN: 基于 office-oxide Rust 原生库将 Office 文档（DOCX、XLSX、PPTX）转换为 Markdown 或 HTML，支持 XLSX 合并单元格复制策略
description.en-US: Convert Office documents (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX) to Markdown or HTML using the office-oxide Rust native library, with merged-cell copy strategy for XLSX tables
author: my-project
